column1:
Explain the importance of ethics in data science and the ethical considerations when handling personal data.  
Describe methods for protecting privacy through data anonymization techniques.  
Identify and recognize examples of algorithmic bias and its consequences.  
Understand issues related to consent and data usage in data science contexts.  
Assess the environmental impacts associated with big data and data centers.
